rationale: Substantial feature change with matching test coverage: adds a new UNKNOWN catalyst type, replaces naive hay.includes(kw) with token-boundary matching via headlineMatchesKeyword (correctly handles the defense-sector vs sector token boundary), removes the unused posture UI column, and adds telemetry logMoversCatalystTypeCounts. New tests in catalystKeywords.test.ts cover the new function and the new classification behavior. The detector flagged this as fake-refactor because some code was removed (POSTURE rendering) and other code renamed/restructured, but every removal is paired with a coherent replacement and the test file grew to cover the new behavior — this is a legitimate refactor-plus-feature PR.
